title: Operator tokens
description: Per-operator bearer tokens for the admin/maintenance routes (purge-history, purge-audit-logs, rotate-master-key, etc.). Each token is bound to your user identity; a leaked token forges only your identity, never an arbitrary admin.
tenantScopeNote: Tokens are scoped to the current tenant. Multi-tenant operators must mint a separate token per tenant.
tokenCreated: Token created. Copy it now — it will not be shown again.
tokenRevokeConfirm: Revoke this operator token? Any script using it will return 401 immediately. The audit log will retain the token's history.
inactiveTokens: {count, plural, =1 {Show 1 inactive token} other {Show # inactive tokens}}
staleSession: Re-authenticate within the last 15 minutes to issue an operator token. Sign out and sign in again, then retry.
limitExceeded: Maximum number of operator tokens per tenant reached. Please revoke unused tokens first.
